aiPlanning.title: AI Planning
aiPlanning.description: Our artificial intelligence creates personalized itineraries based on your preferences, budget, and unique interests.

secureBooking.title: Secure Booking
secureBooking.description: 100% secure booking process with state-of-the-art encryption and guaranteed data protection.

globalDestinations.title: Global Destinations
globalDestinations.description: Access to over 1000 destinations worldwide, from cosmopolitan cities to tropical paradises.

community.title: Traveler Community
community.description: Connect with other travelers, share experiences, and discover unique destinations through our community.

analytics.title: Travel Analytics
analytics.description: Detailed reports of your travels with insights on spending, preferences, and personalized recommendations.
